PackList.title: Glamour Hearts
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use the attached photo as the ONLY facial reference. Do NOT change the face in any way. Preserve exact facial structure, eye shape, eye color, eyebrows, nose, lips, jawline, chin, skin texture, facial proportions.

NO FRECKLES (MANDATORY). SKIN TEXTURE (CRITICAL): neat, clean, realistic pores and micro texture; no smoothing. LIPS & MICRO-DETAIL (CRITICAL): preserve original lip shape exactly. HAIR PRESERVATION (STRICT): Preserve original hairstyle exactly.

High-glamour medium-shot portrait with classic Hollywood aesthetic, posing against solid deep red background. Wearing structured off-the-shoulder white satin corset dress and matching white opera gloves. Several male hands enter from frame edges holding large flat vibrant red paper hearts around subject, creating symmetrical pop-art-inspired framing.

FACIAL DETAILS: Flawless porcelain skin with soft matte finish and subtle contouring. Intense piercing eyes matching original eye color with focused slightly upward gaze. Detailed sharp black winged eyeliner (cat-eye) defines upper lids, complemented by long voluminous individual lashes. Neutral champagne shimmer eyeshadow with soft brown crease. Bold high-shine glossy cherry red lipstick with perfectly defined cupid's bow following original lip shape exactly. Perfectly arched groomed eyebrows with soft feathered texture.

HAIR: Voluminous glossy Hollywood waves parted deeply to side and cascading over one shoulder. Elegant double-drop white pearl earrings.

LIGHTING: Professional studio photography with softbox lighting creating gentle sheen on skin and satin fabric. High contrast between crisp white dress, vivid red hearts, and dark background.

9:16 vertical, 8K resolution, cinematic color grading, sharp focus on facial features, shallow depth of field, retro glamour, pin-up aesthetic, Vogue editorial style.
